info.name: Currency Colon Salvadoreno
info.description: El Salvador uses USD (US Dollar) as its official currency. Rates are 1:1 with USD.

buyRate.description: Buy rate for USD in El Salvador (always 1.0 as it uses USD - fixed, not editable)

sellRate.description: Sell rate for USD in El Salvador (always 1.0 as it uses USD - fixed, not editable)
